$comment: Conformance fixtures for the smooth-operator wire protocol. Each entry is a valid instance of the named schema. Clients and servers validate their outgoing/incoming messages against these to catch drift between implementations.

create_session_response.description: Session creation response carried in an immediate_response event's data field.

send_message_request.description: A user message submitted to an active session with streaming enabled.

instance.message: What is the status of my last order?

stream_chunk_event.description: A per-node state snapshot emitted as the knowledge_search node completes.

snippets: Order #ORD-9982 was shipped on 2026-06-01 via FedEx (tracking: 123456789012).

eventual_response_event.description: Terminal response event for a completed send_message turn.

responseParts: Your order #ORD-9982 was shipped on June 1st via FedEx.
Tracking number: 123456789012. Expected delivery is June 4th.
response.requestSummary: User asked about the status of their most recent order.
suggestedNextActions: Contact support if package does not arrive by June 5th

eventual_response_with_citations_event.description: Terminal response for a knowledge-grounded turn that carries the sources it used. One citation is a GitHub-sourced doc (with a blob url), the other a local doc with no web source (url omitted).

responseParts: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

citations.title: acme/handbook@main#policies/returns.md
citations.snippet: SmooAI returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

citations.title: policies/shipping.md
citations.snippet: Standard shipping takes 5 to 7 business days within the continental US.
